---
name: Data error report
about: Report an error in the dataset values, units, or metadata
title: "[Data Error] "
labels: bug, data-quality
---

## Affected dataset

- **Process:** (e.g., Knitting, Spinning, Weaving, Dyeing)
- **File:** (e.g., `datasets/knitting/impact-scores.csv`)
- **Dataset/Activity name:** (e.g., "Flat Knitting, Average")

## What is incorrect?

Describe the error you found.

## Expected value

What should the correct value be? Please include a reference or source.

## Source/Reference

Link to the supporting literature, standard, or data source.
